programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: After a decade of failed promises to clean up the house, Ann's partner has had it. Ann cleans up or he leaves her for good. S8 Ep14.

programme.title: Rainn Wilson And The Geography Of Bliss
programme.desc: In Thailand, Rainn hopes to learn the art of enjoying himself while in the company of cabaret dancers, fortune-telling monks, kickboxers and farmers peddling sexual enhancement supplements.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium
programme.desc: UFC fighter Ronda Rousey's tough exterior is shattered when Tyler brings forward a message from her beloved departed father.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium
programme.desc: Tituss Burgess is flabbergasted to learn that his bedroom activities are being spectated by an unwelcome visitor from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Twins Keira and Keiana couldn't wait to see twins Katrice and Katherine at the annual twin festival.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloe. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Celebrity Family Feud
programme.desc: Vocal harmony group Boyz II Men, comic and talk show host Amber Ruffin, and actor-comics Joe Lo Truglio and Thomas Lennon compete for charity.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: The Altmans announce the grand opening ceremony of their new office in Orange County. Tracy encounters a surprise at her West Hollywood penthouse listing and attends a double date set up by Altman.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Vivian has custody over her grandsons but is on the verge of losing them to Child Protective Services because of her hoard. S8 Ep15.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: A busy weekend at St Georges sees 50-year-old Graham rushed to hospital after falling off his motorbike at high speed.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: As Alesia scrambles to bury a regrettable text, gossip spreads faster than she can contain it. Chef Ben finds his footing in the galley until a broken oven threatens to derail the charter.

programme.title: Lady Of The Dune
programme.desc: The quest to identify the oldest unidentified homicide victim In Massachusetts.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The deadly beating of a young man in West Liberty, Iowa sits unsolved for twenty-five years, until cold case detectives are approached by an unexpected witness.

programme.title: The Real Murders Of Atlanta
programme.desc: A 23-year-old Atlanta mother is shot & left for dead in front of her infant daughter, investigators unravel a complicated scheme.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: The Altmans announce the grand opening ceremony of their new office in Orange County. Tracy encounters a surprise at her West Hollywood penthouse listing and attends a double date set up by Altman.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Vivian has custody over her grandsons but is on the verge of losing them to Child Protective Services because of her hoard. S8 Ep15.

programme.title: Rainn Wilson And The Geography Of Bliss
programme.desc: For Rainn, LA has never been a very happy place; alongside sugar-rushed partygoers and a Yoda in tennis shoes, Rainn looks for bliss in his own backyard.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium
programme.desc: By bringing through specific details, The Goldbergs star Hayley Orrantia has an emotional revelation about her deceased grandmother's final few moments.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium
programme.desc: Pop music legend La Toya Jackson finally finds the closure she's been looking for as Tyler answers the question all of America is asking.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Ashley is suing her friend Abigail for $2,000 for production and fabric cost for costumes for a Caribbean Carnival.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe try to get to the root of Kourtney's bad attitude, which ignites another huge fight between the girls. Meanwhile Kim makes Kendall a promise she can't keep.

programme.title: Celebrity Family Feud
programme.desc: The cast of Abbott Elementary plays against the cast of Hacks; Kal Penn goes head-to-head with Erika Christensen.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: The Altmans' tension boils over as Heather rushes to finish the Orange County office for their grand opening. Flagg hosts a tour of his historic Pasadena estate.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A retired nurse makes extra money selling things that other people have discarded, but is fined thousands of dollars a week because her three Florida homes are overflowing with her inventory.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: Josh is rushed into A&E with head and spinal injuries after coming off his motorbike. Phoenix is in paediatrics after sucking on a bleach tablet.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa organizes the annual SUR photoshoot where new hostess Angelica catches Jason's eye. Natalie and Shayne go on their first date, but things go awry at Angelica's pool party.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When authorities respond to a car fire in rural Michigan, they find a charred body discarded nearby. As the investigation unfolds, the victim's phone records point to a vicious plot.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A former ladies man has a change of heart when he falls for a daycare worker, but when his body is found in a creek, detectives discover there's more to their relationship.

programme.title: The Real Murders Of Atlanta
programme.desc: A retired Delta employee is found stabbed dozens of times in her picturesque suburban home, stunning the Atlanta area.
